response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker matching the primary stack. Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates engineering rigor through TDD, pairing, CI/CD practices, and active community teaching. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited recent Kotlin/Java work, but the breadth of languages and proven adaptability suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS matching core stack
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work directly matches AI agent requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, CI/CD, plus open-source maintainership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the primary stack
No explicit Vitest mention (testing experience appears framework-agnostic)
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (robotic arms work 2016-2018), limited recent secondary-stack evidence
